name: maca
mechanism: Limited human and preclinical data suggest macamides and glucosinolates may influence stress-response and metabolic signaling; definitive mechanism remains uncertain.
contraindications: use caution during pregnancy or breastfeeding due to limited safety data
use caution in hormone-sensitive conditions until more clinical data are available
interactions: Caution with: monitor with thyroid medications (goitrogen containing preparations)
Caution with: use caution with antihypertensive or glucose lowering medications
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated in food-level and supplemental use, but high-quality long-term safety trials are limited. Use standardized products and monitor for gastrointestinal upset or sleep disturbance.
description: Maca is a medicinal herb traditionally used for libido and perceived energy.
